steps.title: Locate x equals 5 on the horizontal axis
steps.content: On the graph, find $x = 5$ on the horizontal axis. This position lies directly below the vertex of the parabola.

steps.title: Read the y-coordinate at x equals 5
steps.content: From $x = 5$, trace vertically upward to where it meets the curve. The parabola reaches its minimum point at this location, with a y-value of $y = 3$. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
